'''Poytta''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] used by many [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] as a refueling stop. It also served as [[Tuga SalPivo]]'s base of operations.

{{Planet-stub}}
